description: A plant manager is reviewing the monthly performance report for critical assets.

nodes.task_description: Generate the asset performance report for the last month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent obtains the report showing key metrics like uptime, downtime, and mean time between failures (MTBF).

nodes.task_description: Identify the asset with the lowest uptime for the month.

expected_outcome.value: The manager identifies that a specific haul truck had the lowest uptime at 85%.

nodes.task_description: Drill down into the maintenance history for that truck to understand the reasons for its poor performance.

expected_outcome.value: The manager reviews the work orders for the truck and sees it had multiple engine-related failures.
